title: Grabette: an open system to record robot-manipulation data
byline: Steve Nguyen, Claire Houziel, Gaelle Lannuzel, Simon Le Goff, Jeremy Laville, Étienne
excerpt: We’re on a journey to advance and democratize artificial intelligence through open source and open science.
content_html:
Back to Articles

Grabette: an open system to record robot-manipulation data.
And build a shared dataset, together.

  • The bottleneck isn’t the model. It’s the data.
  • Standing on the shoulders of UMI
  • Meet Grabette
  • Built for everyone
  • From your hand to a dataset, in two steps
    • 1. Record
    • 2. Process, directly in your browser
  • What can you do with the data? Here’s one example.
  • Now it's your turn
    • What's next

Record your own manipulation tasks in minutes with a handheld gripper, turn them into robot-ready datasets automatically, and help grow an open, collaborative dataset for robot learning.

The bottleneck isn’t the model. It’s the data.

Robot learning has a supply problem. We have capable policy architectures (transformer-based VLAs, diffusion and flow-matching policies, and even world models) and the GPUs to train them. What we lack is large, diverse, real-world manipulation data.

Teleoperating a robot to collect it can be expensive and demanding: first of all, it requires a robot. And depending on the teleoperation method, data collection can be tedious for the user if it takes hours and involve significant hardware and logistical challenges. That is difficult to scale with the wide variety of tasks and environnements required.

But you don't need a robot to collect robot data. Just a human hand, a gripper, a camera, and a way to recover the 6-DoF trajectory of what the hand did. Capture the demonstration and you have data a robot can learn from.

That's what we're releasing today: Grabette, an open, low-cost system for recording manipulation data. Pick it up, record a task with your own hand, and get back a clean, robot-ready dataset. No robot, no lab, no teleop rig.

And that's the bigger goal: if recording a demonstration is as easy as shooting a video, anyone can contribute. We want Grabette to seed a large, open, collaborative manipulation dataset. One no single lab could ever build alone.

Standing on the shoulders of UMI

Grabette is directly inspired by the Universal Manipulation Interface (UMI) from Stanford: a handheld gripper with a fisheye camera that records demonstrations "in the wild", recovers camera trajectories with SLAM, and trains visuomotor policies from them.

UMI proved the recipe works. Other (closed source) devices exists like Agibot's MEgo gripper, Genrobot's DAS gripper and Sunday Robotics skill capture glove. Our goal was to make it effortless to use, to get the barrier from "I have a task" to "I have a trained model" as low as possible.

Grabette is built into the modern open ecosystem: LeRobot for datasets, the Hugging Face Hub for sharing, and a processing pipeline you run from your browser with nothing to install. Grabette is something anyone can build on a workbench, use in the field, and contribute data from.

Meet Grabette

We have been developing Grabette for months, and we feel it has become usable enough to share. We are excited to share it now with you!

Grabette is a handheld gripper instrumented with everything needed to reconstruct a manipulation demonstration.

It carries two cameras, each with a distinct job. Splitting the two roles is deliberate: the cheap wide fisheye gives the policy the context-rich, wrist-camera-style view it needs, while the RGBD camera does the heavy lifting of robust 6-DoF tracking.

And while Grabette records data during tasks performed by a user, it relies on its robotic counterpart to execute the movements it has learned after training. So, meet Gripette, the robotic arm end-effector twin of Grabette.

The family shares the same hardware DNA:

  • Grabette, the handheld demonstration device (camera + IMU + gripper, BOM cost ~490€)
  • Gripette, the motorized gripper (camera + two servomotors, BOM cost ~120€) that closes the loop on a real or simulated robot arm

Grabette hand held recording device (left) and Gripette robot gripper (right)

Built for everyone

Everything is open source

Go check the repository!

  • Hardware: CAD and production files for Grabette and Gripette
  • Capture service: the on-device Raspberry Pi software
  • Processing pipeline: run locally, or online via our Hugging Face Space
  • Example downstream stack: stock LeRobot training + the OpenArm evaluation, as a reference

Components. Standard sensors you can buy, no closed pipeline, no fork lock-in. A Raspberry Pi, a standard Pi camera, an off-the-shelf OAK-D depth camera, magnetic encoders. The whole point is that anyone can build one from parts you can just order.

Robot-agnostic by design. Nothing in the capture or the data format assumes a particular arm. Demonstrations are stored as camera-local 6-DoF cartesian pose plus gripper state, the output is a standard LeRobot dataset on the Hugging Face Hub, so the same data can drive different robots and different learning methods. You will still need the matching Gripette gripper on your arm though.

From your hand to a dataset, in two steps

This release enables anyone to go from "I want to demonstrate a task" to "I have a training-ready dataset" quickly and without prior expertise.

1. Record

Press the button, and data from the observation camera, the tracking camera (color, depth, and IMU), and the gripper’s encoder joint values are recorded simultaneously, using a single shared clock to ensure proper synchronization. Press the button again to stop the episode, and the data is saved locally on the Raspberry Pi.

2. Process, directly in your browser

Open the Grabette dashboard in your browser. Select the episodes you want to add to the dataset, and with one click, post-processing begins.

  • The episodes are uploaded to the HF Hub
  • The grabette-slam space performs SLAM using RTAB-MAP library and verifies that the trajectory is correct (with no jumps or loss of tracking)
  • The episodes are converted to LeRobot format
  • A new dataset is uploaded to your space, where you can view the data for each episode using the Le Robot visualizer

Everything is now ready to start training!

What can you do with the data? Here’s one example.

A dataset is only interesting if it trains something. So, to show the loop end-to-end, we ship a complete example. But to be clear, this is an example of what is enables, not the product: the release is the recording system. Your Grabette data works with any method that consumes LeRobot datasets.

Our example takes 200 recorded demonstrations such as :

and:

  • Trains a policy with the LeRobot stack — a Diffusion Policy (ResNet18 + SpatialSoftmax encoder, DDIM scheduler, 6-D rotation actions) that fits on a single consumer GPU.
  • Evaluates it on a OpenArm 7-DoF arm with the Gripette gripper, driven over a gRPC API, with this result :

Now it's your turn

The data bottleneck doesn’t get solved by one lab, but by a community recording demonstrations everywhere. You can now help build the dataset: build a Grabette, record tasks you are interested in, and share them on the Hub. Every episode makes the open dataset bigger and more diverse, and every contributor makes robot learning a little less gated behind expensive hardware.

What's next

This release is only the start of the project! Grabette will keep evolving. We already have more coming, including Casquette, a head-mounted POV device to complement Grabette for egocentric capture (still a work in progress). But the most important next step isn’t only ours, it’s also yours: start recording, and let’s build the dataset together.

👉 Build a Grabette (GitHub) · Process your data (HF Space) · Contribute to the dataset

Built with ❤️ by Pollen Robotics.

blocks.html_en: Grabette is directly inspired by the Universal Manipulation Interface (UMI) from Stanford: a handheld gripper with a fisheye camera that records demonstrations "in the wild", recovers camera trajectories with SLAM, and trains visuomotor policies from them.

sentences.en: Grabette is directly inspired by the Universal Manipulation Interface (UMI) from Stanford: a handheld gripper with a fisheye camera that records demonstrations "in the wild", recovers camera trajectories with SLAM, and trains visuomotor policies from them.
sentences.zh: Grabette 的直接灵感来自斯坦福大学的通用操纵接口 (UMI)：带有鱼眼相机的手持式抓手，可以记录“野外”演示，通过 SLAM 恢复相机轨迹，并从中训练视觉运动策略。

blocks.html_en: UMI proved the recipe works. Other (closed source) devices exists like Agibot's MEgo gripper, Genrobot's DAS gripper and Sunday Robotics skill capture glove. Our goal was to make it effortless to use, to get the barrier from "I have a task" to "I have a trained model" as low as possible.

sentences.zh: UMI 证明这个配方是有效的。

sentences.en: Other (closed source) devices exists like Agibot's MEgo gripper, Genrobot's DAS gripper and Sunday Robotics skill capture glove.
sentences.zh: 其他（闭源）设备还包括 Agibot 的 MEgo 抓手、Genrobot 的 DAS 抓手和 Sunday Robotics 技能捕捉手套。

sentences.en: Our goal was to make it effortless to use, to get the barrier from "I have a task" to "I have a trained model" as low as possible.
sentences.zh: 我们的目标是让它轻松使用，尽可能降低从“我有一个任务”到“我有一个经过训练的模型”的障碍。

sentences.en: Grabette is something anyone can build on a workbench, use in the field, and contribute data from.
sentences.zh: Grabette 是任何人都可以在工作台上构建、在现场使用并从中贡献数据的东西。

sentences.zh: 将这两个角色分开是经过深思熟虑的：廉价的宽鱼眼为策略提供了所需的上下文丰富的腕式摄像头式视图，而 RGBD 摄像头则负责强大的 6 自由度跟踪的繁重工作。

blocks.html_en: And while Grabette records data during tasks performed by a user, it relies on its robotic counterpart to execute the movements it has learned after training. So, meet Gripette, the robotic arm end-effector twin of Grabette.

sentences.en: So, meet Gripette, the robotic arm end-effector twin of Grabette.
sentences.zh: 那么，来认识一下 Gripette，它是 Grabette 的机械臂末端执行器双胞胎。

blocks.html_en: • Gripette, the motorized gripper (camera + two servomotors, BOM cost ~120€) that closes the loop on a real or simulated robot arm

sentences.zh: Gripette，电动夹具（摄像头 + 两个伺服电机，BOM 成本约 120 欧元），可闭合真实或模拟机器人手臂上的环路

blocks.html_en: Grabette hand held recording device (left) and Gripette robot gripper (right)

sentences.en: Grabette hand held recording device (left) and Gripette robot gripper (right)
sentences.zh: Grabette手持记录装置（左）和Gripette机器人抓手（右）

blocks.html_en: Built for everyone

sentences.en: Built for everyone
sentences.zh: 为所有人打造

blocks.html_en: Everything is open source

sentences.en: Everything is open source
sentences.zh: 一切都是开源的

blocks.html_en: Go check the repository!

sentences.en: Go check the repository!
sentences.zh: 去检查存储库！

blocks.html_en: • Hardware: CAD and production files for Grabette and Gripette

sentences.en: Hardware: CAD and production files for Grabette and Gripette
sentences.zh: 硬件：Grabette 和 Gripette 的 CAD 和生产文件

blocks.html_en: • Capture service: the on-device Raspberry Pi software

sentences.en: Capture service: the on-device Raspberry Pi software
sentences.zh: 捕获服务：设备上的 Raspberry Pi 软件

blocks.html_en: • Processing pipeline: run locally, or online via our Hugging Face Space

sentences.en: Processing pipeline: run locally, or online via our Hugging Face Space
sentences.zh: 处理管道：本地运行，或通过我们的 Hugging Face Space 在线运行

blocks.html_en: • Example downstream stack: stock LeRobot training + the OpenArm evaluation, as a reference

sentences.en: Example downstream stack: stock LeRobot training + the OpenArm evaluation, as a reference
sentences.zh: 下游堆栈示例：LeRobot 训练 + OpenArm 评估，作为参考

blocks.html_en: Components. Standard sensors you can buy, no closed pipeline, no fork lock-in. A Raspberry Pi, a standard Pi camera, an off-the-shelf OAK-D depth camera, magnetic encoders. The whole point is that anyone can build one from parts you can just order.

sentences.en: Components.
sentences.zh: 成分。

sentences.en: Standard sensors you can buy, no closed pipeline, no fork lock-in.
sentences.zh: 您可以购买标准传感器，无封闭管道，无货叉锁定。

sentences.en: A Raspberry Pi, a standard Pi camera, an off-the-shelf OAK-D depth camera, magnetic encoders.
sentences.zh: 一个 Raspberry Pi、一个标准 Pi 相机、一个现成的 OAK-D 深度相机、磁性编码器。

sentences.en: The whole point is that anyone can build one from parts you can just order.
sentences.zh: 重点是任何人都可以用您只需订购的零件来构建一个。

blocks.html_en: Robot-agnostic by design. Nothing in the capture or the data format assumes a particular arm. Demonstrations are stored as camera-local 6-DoF cartesian pose plus gripper state, the output is a standard LeRobot dataset on the Hugging Face Hub, so the same data can drive different robots and different learning methods. You will still need the matching Gripette gripper on your arm though.

sentences.en: Robot-agnostic by design.
sentences.zh: 设计上与机器人无关。

sentences.en: Nothing in the capture or the data format assumes a particular arm.
sentences.zh: 捕获或数据格式中的任何内容均不假定特定的手臂。

sentences.en: Demonstrations are stored as camera-local 6-DoF cartesian pose plus gripper state, the output is a standard LeRobot dataset on the Hugging Face Hub, so the same data can drive different robots and different learning methods.
sentences.zh: 演示存储为相机局部 6-DoF 笛卡尔姿态加上夹具状态，输出是 Hugging Face Hub 上的标准 LeRobot 数据集，因此相同的数据可以驱动不同的机器人和不同的学习方法。

sentences.en: You will still need the matching Gripette gripper on your arm though.
sentences.zh: 不过，您的手臂上仍然需要配套的 Gripette 夹具。

blocks.html_en: From your hand to a dataset, in two steps

sentences.en: From your hand to a dataset, in two steps
sentences.zh: 从你的手到数据集，只需两步

blocks.html_en: This release enables anyone to go from "I want to demonstrate a task" to "I have a training-ready dataset" quickly and without prior expertise.

sentences.en: This release enables anyone to go from "I want to demonstrate a task" to "I have a training-ready dataset" quickly and without prior expertise.
sentences.zh: 此版本使任何人都可以快速从“我想演示一项任务”转变为“我有一个可用于训练的数据集”，而无需事先具备专业知识。

blocks.html_en: 1. Record

sentences.en: Record
sentences.zh: 记录

blocks.html_en: Press the button, and data from the observation camera, the tracking camera (color, depth, and IMU), and the gripper’s encoder joint values are recorded simultaneously, using a single shared clock to ensure proper synchronization. Press the button again to stop the episode, and the data is saved locally on the Raspberry Pi.

sentences.en: Press the button, and data from the observation camera, the tracking camera (color, depth, and IMU), and the gripper’s encoder joint values are recorded simultaneously, using a single shared clock to ensure proper synchronization.
sentences.zh: 按下按钮，来自观察相机、跟踪相机（颜色、深度和 IMU）和夹具编码器关节值的数据将同时记录，使用单个共享时钟来确保正确的同步。

sentences.en: Press the button again to stop the episode, and the data is saved locally on the Raspberry Pi.
sentences.zh: 再次按下按钮即可停止播放，数据将保存在 Raspberry Pi 本地。

blocks.html_en: 2. Process, directly in your browser

sentences.en: Process, directly in your browser
sentences.zh: 直接在浏览器中处理

blocks.html_en: Open the Grabette dashboard in your browser. Select the episodes you want to add to the dataset, and with one click, post-processing begins.

sentences.en: Open the Grabette dashboard in your browser.
sentences.zh: 在浏览器中打开 Grabette 仪表板。

sentences.en: Select the episodes you want to add to the dataset, and with one click, post-processing begins.
sentences.zh: 选择要添加到数据集的剧集，然后单击一下，即可开始后处理。

blocks.html_en: • The episodes are uploaded to the HF Hub

sentences.en: The episodes are uploaded to the HF Hub
sentences.zh: 这些剧集已上传到 HF Hub

blocks.html_en: • The grabette-slam space performs SLAM using RTAB-MAP library and verifies that the trajectory is correct (with no jumps or loss of tracking)

sentences.en: The grabette-slam space performs SLAM using RTAB-MAP library and verifies that the trajectory is correct (with no jumps or loss of tracking)
sentences.zh: grabette-slam 空间使用 RTAB-MAP 库执行 SLAM 并验证轨迹是否正确（没有跳跃或丢失跟踪）

blocks.html_en: • The episodes are converted to LeRobot format

sentences.en: The episodes are converted to LeRobot format
sentences.zh: 剧集转换为 LeRobot 格式

blocks.html_en: • A new dataset is uploaded to your space, where you can view the data for each episode using the Le Robot visualizer

sentences.en: A new dataset is uploaded to your space, where you can view the data for each episode using the Le Robot visualizer
sentences.zh: 新的数据集已上传到您的空间，您可以在其中使用 Le Robot 可视化工具查看每集的数据

blocks.html_en: Everything is now ready to start training!

sentences.en: Everything is now ready to start training!
sentences.zh: 现在一切准备就绪，可以开始训练了！

blocks.html_en: What can you do with the data? Here’s one example.

sentences.en: What can you do with the data?
sentences.zh: 您可以用这些数据做什么？

sentences.en: Here’s one example.
sentences.zh: 这是一个例子。

blocks.html_en: A dataset is only interesting if it trains something. So, to show the loop end-to-end, we ship a complete example. But to be clear, this is an example of what is enables, not the product: the release is the recording system. Your Grabette data works with any method that consumes LeRobot datasets.

sentences.en: A dataset is only interesting if it trains something.
sentences.zh: 数据集只有在训练某些内容时才有意义。

sentences.en: So, to show the loop end-to-end, we ship a complete example.
sentences.zh: 因此，为了端到端地展示循环，我们提供了一个完整的示例。

sentences.en: But to be clear, this is an example of what is enables, not the product: the release is the recording system.
sentences.zh: 但要明确的是，这是一个启用的示例，而不是产品：发布的是记录系统。

sentences.en: Your Grabette data works with any method that consumes LeRobot datasets.
sentences.zh: 您的 Grabette 数据适用于任何使用 LeRobot 数据集的方法。

blocks.html_en: Our example takes 200 recorded demonstrations such as :

sentences.en: Our example takes 200 recorded demonstrations such as :
sentences.zh: 我们的示例采用了 200 个录制的演示，例如：

blocks.html_en: and:
• Trains a policy with the LeRobot stack — a Diffusion Policy (ResNet18 + SpatialSoftmax encoder, DDIM scheduler, 6-D rotation actions) that fits on a single consumer GPU.

sentences.en: Trains a policy with the LeRobot stack — a Diffusion Policy (ResNet18 + SpatialSoftmax encoder, DDIM scheduler, 6-D rotation actions) that fits on a single consumer GPU.
sentences.zh: 使用 LeRobot 堆栈训练策略 - 适合单个消费者 GPU 的扩散策略（ResNet18 + SpatialSoftmax 编码器、DDIM 调度程序、6 维旋转操作）。

blocks.html_en: • Evaluates it on a OpenArm 7-DoF arm with the Gripette gripper, driven over a gRPC API, with this result :

sentences.en: Evaluates it on a OpenArm 7-DoF arm with the Gripette gripper, driven over a gRPC API, with this result :
sentences.zh: 在带有 Gripette 夹具的 OpenArm 7-DoF 手臂上对其进行评估，通过 gRPC API 驱动，结果如下：

blocks.html_en: Now it's your turn

sentences.en: Now it's your turn
sentences.zh: 现在轮到你了

blocks.html_en: The data bottleneck doesn’t get solved by one lab, but by a community recording demonstrations everywhere. You can now help build the dataset: build a Grabette, record tasks you are interested in, and share them on the Hub. Every episode makes the open dataset bigger and more diverse, and every contributor makes robot learning a little less gated behind expensive hardware.

sentences.en: The data bottleneck doesn’t get solved by one lab, but by a community recording demonstrations everywhere.
sentences.zh: 数据瓶颈不是由一个实验室解决的，而是由社区在各地记录演示来解决的。

sentences.en: You can now help build the dataset: build a Grabette, record tasks you are interested in, and share them on the Hub.
sentences.zh: 您现在可以帮助构建数据集：构建 Grabette，记录您感兴趣的任务，并在 Hub 上共享它们。

sentences.en: Every episode makes the open dataset bigger and more diverse, and every contributor makes robot learning a little less gated behind expensive hardware.
sentences.zh: 每一集都使开放数据集变得更大、更多样化，每一位贡献者都让机器人学习在昂贵的硬件背后变得不那么封闭。

blocks.html_en: What's next

sentences.en: What's next
sentences.zh: 接下来是什么

blocks.html_en: This release is only the start of the project! Grabette will keep evolving. We already have more coming, including Casquette, a head-mounted POV device to complement Grabette for egocentric capture (still a work in progress). But the most important next step isn’t only ours, it’s also yours: start recording, and let’s build the dataset together.

sentences.en: This release is only the start of the project!
sentences.zh: 此版本只是该项目的开始！

sentences.en: Grabette will keep evolving.
sentences.zh: Grabette 将不断发展。

sentences.en: We already have more coming, including Casquette, a head-mounted POV device to complement Grabette for egocentric capture (still a work in progress).
sentences.zh: 我们已经推出了更多产品，包括 Casquette，这是一款头戴式 POV 设备，可补充 Grabette 进行以自我为中心的捕捉（仍在进行中）。

sentences.en: But the most important next step isn’t only ours, it’s also yours: start recording, and let’s build the dataset together.
sentences.zh: 但最重要的下一步不仅是我们的，也是您的：开始记录，让我们一起构建数据集。

blocks.html_en: 👉 Build a Grabette (GitHub) · Process your data (HF Space) · Contribute to the dataset

sentences.en: 👉 Build a Grabette (GitHub) · Process your data (HF Space) · Contribute to the dataset
sentences.zh: 👉 构建 Grabette (GitHub) · 处理您的数据 (HF Space) · 为数据集做出贡献

blocks.html_en: Built with ❤️ by Pollen Robotics.

sentences.en: Built with ❤️ by Pollen Robotics.
sentences.zh: 由 Pollen Robotics 使用 ❤️ 构建。

content_html_zh:
返回文章

Grabette：一个记录机器人操作数据的开放系统。 并共同构建共享数据集。

  • 瓶颈不是模型。 这是数据。
  • 站在UMI的肩膀上
  • 认识格拉贝特
  • 为所有人打造
  • 从您的手中到数据集，只需两个步骤 1. 记录2。 直接在浏览器中处理
  • 您可以用这些数据做什么？ 这是一个例子。
  • 现在轮到你了 接下来做什么

使用手持式抓手在几分钟内记录您自己的操作任务，自动将其转换为机器人就绪的数据集，并帮助开发用于机器人学习的开放式协作数据集。

瓶颈不是模型。 这是数据。

机器人学习存在供给问题。 我们拥有强大的策略架构（基于变压器的 VLA、扩散和流匹配策略，甚至世界模型）和 GPU 来训练它们。 我们缺乏的是大量的、多样化的、真实世界的操纵数据。

远程操作机器人来收集它可能是昂贵且要求很高的：首先，它需要一个机器人。 根据远程操作方法的不同，如果数据收集需要花费数小时并且涉及重大的硬件和后勤挑战，那么数据收集对用户来说可能会很乏味。 这很难适应所需的各种任务和环境。

但你不需要机器人来收集机器人数据。 只需一只人手、一个夹具、一台相机，以及一种恢复手的 6-DoF 轨迹的方法。 捕捉演示后，您就拥有了机器人可以学习的数据。

这就是我们今天发布的：Grabette，一个开放的、低成本的系统，用于记录操纵数据。 拿起它，用自己的双手记录任务，然后得到一个干净的、适合机器人的数据集。 没有机器人，没有实验室，没有遥控设备。

这是更大的目标：如果录制演示像拍摄视频一样简单，那么任何人都可以做出贡献。 我们希望 Grabette 播种一个大型、开放、协作的操作数据集。 任何一个实验室都无法单独建造这一项目。

站在UMI的肩膀上

Grabette 的直接灵感来自斯坦福大学的通用操纵接口 (UMI)：带有鱼眼相机的手持式抓手，可以记录“野外”演示，通过 SLAM 恢复相机轨迹，并从中训练视觉运动策略。

UMI 证明这个配方是有效的。 其他（闭源）设备还包括 Agibot 的 MEgo 抓手、Genrobot 的 DAS 抓手和 Sunday Robotics 技能捕捉手套。 我们的目标是让它轻松使用，尽可能降低从“我有一个任务”到“我有一个经过训练的模型”的障碍。

Grabette 内置于现代开放生态系统中：用于数据集的 LeRobot、用于共享的 Hugging Face Hub，以及无需安装任何内容即可从浏览器运行的处理管道。 Grabette 是任何人都可以在工作台上构建、在现场使用并从中贡献数据的东西。

认识格拉贝特

我们开发 Grabette 已经有几个月了，我们觉得它已经变得足够实用，可以分享了。 我们很高兴现在与您分享！

Grabette 是一款手持式夹具，配备了重建操作演示所需的一切。

它携带两个摄像头，每个摄像头都有不同的工作。 将这两个角色分开是经过深思熟虑的：廉价的宽鱼眼为策略提供了所需的上下文丰富的腕式摄像头式视图，而 RGBD 摄像头则负责强大的 6 自由度跟踪的繁重工作。

虽然 Grabette 在用户执行任务期间记录数据，但它依赖其机器人对手来执行训练后学到的动作。 那么，来认识一下 Gripette，它是 Grabette 的机械臂末端执行器双胞胎。

该系列具有相同的硬件 D​​NA：

  • Grabette，手持式演示设备（相机 + IMU + 夹具，BOM 成本约 490 欧元）
  • Gripette，电动夹具（摄像头 + 两个伺服电机，BOM 成本约 120 欧元），可闭合真实或模拟机器人手臂上的环路

Grabette手持记录装置（左）和Gripette机器人抓手（右）

为所有人打造

一切都是开源的

去检查存储库！

  • 硬件：Grabette 和 Gripette 的 CAD 和生产文件
  • 捕获服务：设备上的 Raspberry Pi 软件
  • 处理管道：本地运行，或通过我们的 Hugging Face Space 在线运行
  • 下游堆栈示例：LeRobot 训练 + OpenArm 评估，作为参考

成分。 您可以购买标准传感器，无封闭管道，无货叉锁定。 一个 Raspberry Pi、一个标准 Pi 相机、一个现成的 OAK-D 深度相机、磁性编码器。 重点是任何人都可以用您只需订购的零件来构建一个。

设计上与机器人无关。 捕获或数据格式中的任何内容均不假定特定的手臂。 演示存储为相机局部 6-DoF 笛卡尔姿态加上夹具状态，输出是 Hugging Face Hub 上的标准 LeRobot 数据集，因此相同的数据可以驱动不同的机器人和不同的学习方法。 不过，您的手臂上仍然需要配套的 Gripette 夹具。

从你的手到数据集，只需两步

此版本使任何人都可以快速从“我想演示一项任务”转变为“我有一个可用于训练的数据集”，而无需事先具备专业知识。

1. 记录

按下按钮，来自观察相机、跟踪相机（颜色、深度和 IMU）和夹具编码器关节值的数据将同时记录，使用单个共享时钟来确保正确的同步。 再次按下按钮即可停止播放，数据将保存在 Raspberry Pi 本地。

2. 直接在浏览器中处理

在浏览器中打开 Grabette 仪表板。 选择要添加到数据集的剧集，然后单击一下，即可开始后处理。

  • 这些剧集已上传到 HF Hub
  • grabette-slam 空间使用 RTAB-MAP 库执行 SLAM 并验证轨迹是否正确（没有跳跃或丢失跟踪）
  • 剧集转换为 LeRobot 格式
  • 新的数据集已上传到您的空间，您可以在其中使用 Le Robot 可视化工具查看每集的数据

现在一切准备就绪，可以开始训练了！

您可以用这些数据做什么？ 这是一个例子。

数据集只有在训练某些内容时才有意义。 因此，为了端到端地展示循环，我们提供了一个完整的示例。 但要明确的是，这是一个启用的示例，而不是产品：发布的是记录系统。 您的 Grabette 数据适用于任何使用 LeRobot 数据集的方法。

我们的示例采用了 200 个录制的演示，例如：

and:

  • 使用 LeRobot 堆栈训练策略 - 适合单个消费者 GPU 的扩散策略（ResNet18 + SpatialSoftmax 编码器、DDIM 调度程序、6 维旋转操作）。
  • 在带有 Gripette 夹具的 OpenArm 7-DoF 手臂上对其进行评估，通过 gRPC API 驱动，结果如下：

现在轮到你了

数据瓶颈不是由一个实验室解决的，而是由社区在各地记录演示来解决的。 您现在可以帮助构建数据集：构建 Grabette，记录您感兴趣的任务，并在 Hub 上共享它们。 每一集都使开放数据集变得更大、更多样化，每一位贡献者都让机器人学习在昂贵的硬件背后变得不那么封闭。

接下来是什么

此版本只是该项目的开始！ Grabette 将不断发展。 我们已经推出了更多产品，包括 Casquette，这是一款头戴式 POV 设备，可补充 Grabette 进行以自我为中心的捕捉（仍在进行中）。 但最重要的下一步不仅是我们的，也是您的：开始记录，让我们一起构建数据集。

👉 构建 Grabette (GitHub) · 处理您的数据 (HF Space) · 为数据集做出贡献

由 Pollen Robotics 使用 ❤️ 构建。
